description: Green or dark green dominant tones; loose, leaf-like or fragmented forms; rough fibrous textures; natural lighting with low contrast.
White or light blue palette; regular granular or crystalline structures; high-contrast cold lighting; hard materials with sharp edges.
Highly saturated, multicolored visuals; unstable or distorted geometric forms; gradients and ghosting effects; strong contrast and dramatic lighting.
Pure white or light gray tones; fine powder-like texture; evenly dispersed particles; high brightness with minimal surface texture.
Dark or low-saturation colors; block-like or flake-shaped forms; soft shadows; warm, low-contrast lighting.
White or neutral colors; standardized tablets or capsules; symmetrical and orderly shapes; uniform, evenly distributed lighting.
